revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿五]][[zh:七月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿五]][[zh:七月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿五]][[zh:七月廿五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 25 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月25日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 25일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月廿五]][[zh:七月廿五]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 25|qq=July 25}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月廿五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 25일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 25''' is the 25th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 1 of {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen (era)|1=Chōgen}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}} , {{ill|1028|en|1028|qid=Q19273|lt=1028|1=1028}} ) – The era name changed from {{ill|Manju (era)|en|Manju (era)|qid=Q1194155|lt=Manju (era)|1=Manju (era)}} to Chōgen. * Year 2 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Juei|1=Keichō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1183|en|1183|qid=Q19723|lt=1183|1=1183}} ) – {{ill|Taira no Munemori|en|Taira no Munemori|qid=Q2420085|lt=Taira no Munemori|1=Taira no Munemori}} and the {{ill|Taira clan|ja|平家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 伊勢平氏}} fled the capital, taking {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|qid=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku|1=Emperor Antoku}} and the {{ill|Imperial Regalia of Japan|en|Imperial Regalia of Japan|qid=Q327465|lt=Three Sacred Treasures|1=Imperial Regalia of Japan}} with them to the western provinces. * Year 1 of {{ill|Kyōtoku|en|Kyōtoku|qid=Q1143370|lt=Kyōtoku|1=Kyōtoku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 10|en|August 10|qid=Q2779|lt=August 10|1=August 10}} , {{ill|1452|en|1452|qid=Q6460|lt=1452|1=1452}} ) – The era name changed from {{ill|Hōtoku|en|Hōtoku|qid=Q1143606|lt=Hōtoku (Japan)|1=Hōtoku}} to Kyōtoku to avoid astrological misfortunes. * Year 1 of {{ill|Kōshō|en|Kōshō|qid=Q1143364|lt=Kōshō|1=Kōshō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|September 6|en|September 6|qid=Q2858|lt=September 6|1=September 6}} , {{ill|1455|en|1455|qid=Q6480|lt=1455|1=1455}} ) – The era name changed from Kyōtoku to Kōshō. * Year 11 of {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 18|en|August 18|qid=Q2826|lt=August 18|1=August 18}} , {{ill|1568|en|1568|qid=Q6648|lt=1568|1=1568}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja|Ashikaga Yoshiaki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashikaga Yoshiaki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} sought refuge with {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} in Mino. * Year 5 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|1600|en|1600|qid=Q6720|lt=1600|1=1600}} ) – While marching toward Aizu, {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} arrived at {{ill|Oyama, Tochigi|ja|小山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oyama, Tochigi|1=Q18668747|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q18668747}} , where he learned of {{ill|Ishida Mitsunari|en|Ishida Mitsunari|qid=Q334107|lt=Ishida Mitsunari|1=Ishida Mitsunari}} 's uprising and held the {{ill|Council of Oyama|ja|小山評定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Council of Oyama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 関ヶ原の戦い|1=Battle of Sekigahara|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q234188}} , deciding to confront Mitsunari in what would become the {{ill|Battle of Sekigahara|en|Battle of Sekigahara|qid=Q234188|lt=Battle of Sekigahara|1=Battle of Sekigahara}} . * Year 6 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 12|en|September 12|qid=Q2849|lt=September 12|1=September 12}} , {{ill|1629|en|1629|qid=Q6847|lt=1629|1=1629}} ) – {{ill|Purple Robe Incident|en|Purple Robe Incident|qid=Q8011095|lt=Shie Incident|1=Purple Robe Incident}} : The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} banned the imperial grant of purple robes to monks, leading to protests and the exile of {{ill|Takuan Sōhō|en|Takuan Sōhō|qid=Q632866|lt=Takuan Sōhō|1=Takuan Sōhō}} and others to the northeast.
== Births == * Year 5 of {{ill|Einin|en|Einin|qid=Q1327307|lt=Einin|1=Einin}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 14|en|August 14|qid=Q2775|lt=August 14|1=August 14}} , {{ill|1297|en|1297|qid=Q5562|lt=1297|1=1297}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Hanazono|en|Emperor Hanazono|qid=Q440503|lt=Emperor Hanazono|1=Emperor Hanazono}} , 95th emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1348|en|1348|qid=Q6085|lt=1348|1=1348}} ). * Year 2 of {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}} , {{ill|1717|en|1717|qid=Q6895|lt=1717|1=1717}} ) – {{ill|Sō Yoshimichi|ja|宗義蕃|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sō Yoshimichi|1=Sō Yoshiari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11452038}} , 9th lord of {{ill|Tsushima-Fuchū Domain|en|Tsushima-Fuchū Domain|qid=Q1067698|lt=Tsushima-Fuchū Domain|1=Tsushima-Fuchū Domain}} (d. {{ill|1775|en|1775|qid=Q7700|lt=1775|1=1775}} ). * Year 5 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 28|en|August 28|qid=Q2817|lt=August 28|1=August 28}} , {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} ) – {{ill|Sugimura Shōjunkan|ja|杉村楚人冠|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugimura Shōjunkan|1=Sugimura Sojinkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11522159}} , journalist and essayist (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} ).
== Deaths == * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199879}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 31|en|August 31|qid=Q2830|lt=August 31|1=August 31}} , {{ill|731|en|731|qid=Q23566|lt=731|1=731}} ) – {{ill|Ōtomo no Tabito|en|Ōtomo no Tabito|qid=Q386287|lt=Ōtomo no Tabito|1=Ōtomo no Tabito}} , noble and poet (b. {{ill|665|en|665|qid=Q30684|lt=665|1=665}} ). * Year 9 of {{ill|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|ja|Tenpyō|1=Tenpyō|2=ja|3=天平|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpyō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199879}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|737|en|737|qid=Q411351|lt=737|1=737}} ) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Muchimaro|en|Fujiwara no Muchimaro|qid=Q1890878|lt=Fujiwara no Muchimaro|1=Fujiwara no Muchimaro}} , eldest son of {{ill|Fujiwara no Fuhito|en|Fujiwara no Fuhito|qid=Q177517|lt=Fujiwara no Fuhito|1=Fujiwara no Fuhito}} (b. {{ill|680|en|680|qid=Q23453|lt=680|1=680}} ). * Year 5 of {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|qid=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa (Kamakura period)|1=Shōwa (1312–1317)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} , {{ill|1316|en|1316|qid=Q5744|lt=1316|1=1316}} ) – {{ill|Utsunomiya Sadanaga|ja|宇都宮貞綱|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya Sadanaga|1=Q11449820|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449820}} , samurai of the Kamakura period (b. {{ill|1266|en|1266|qid=Q5517|lt=1266|1=1266}} ). * Year 12 of {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 20|en|August 20|qid=Q2824|lt=August 20|1=August 20}} , {{ill|1699|en|1699|qid=Q7710|lt=1699|1=1699}} ) – {{ill|Prince Arisugawa Yukihito|ja|有栖川宮幸仁親王|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Prince Arisugawa Yukihito|1=Arisugawa-no-miya Yukihito-shinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11516503}} , 3rd head of the {{ill|Arisugawa-no-miya|en|Arisugawa-no-miya|qid=Q2861427|lt=Arisugawa-no-miya|1=Arisugawa-no-miya}} family (b. {{ill|1656|en|1656|qid=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} ). * Year 3 of {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku (Japan)|1=Shōtoku (era)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 14|en|September 14|qid=Q2847|lt=September 14|1=September 14}} , {{ill|1713|en|1713|qid=Q6873|lt=1713|1=1713}} ) – {{ill|Ōkubo Tadamasu|en|Ōkubo Tadamasu|qid=Q11431969|lt=Ōkubo Tadamasu|1=Ōkubo Tadamasu}} , 2nd lord of {{ill|Odawara Domain|en|Odawara Domain|qid=Q903467|lt=Odawara Domain|1=Odawara Domain}} (b. {{ill|1656|en|1656|qid=Q6982|lt=1656|1=1656}} ). * (Gregorian calendar {{ill|September 2|en|September 2|qid=Q2857|lt=September 2|1=September 2}} , {{ill|1820|en|1820|qid=Q6973|lt=1820|1=1820}} ) – {{ill|Jiaqing Emperor|en|Jiaqing Emperor|qid=Q333178|lt=Jiaqing Emperor|1=Jiaqing Emperor}} , 7th emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|qid=Q8733|lt=Qing dynasty|1=Qing dynasty}} (b. {{ill|1760|en|1760|qid=Q7646|lt=1760|1=1760}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|24|7|26|6|25|8|7|0725|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 25일]] [[ja:7月25日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月廿五]]
[[ar:July 25 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿五]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 25 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月廿五]] {{wikidata link|Q839678}} [[Category:Days 25 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Senshō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
